view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email interaction is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email interaction is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for branching logic by confirming the presence of a condition step in the marketing campaign that checks if an email was opened. Specifically, the evidence shows a step with the key 'if_opened' that directs to different actions based on whether the email was opened or not, fulfilling the requirement of 'if opened email, do X; if not, do Y'. This direct mapping to the requirement indicates that the system's behavior aligns with the expected branching logic.
